description: timeline.html shows all messages across all chats sorted by timestamp
steps: Produce an ExtractionResult with 2 chats, messages interleaved by timestamp
Assert messages appear in ascending timestamp order (earlier message before later)
Assert each row contains chat name, sender, and content

description: timeline.html includes a search/filter input and links back to index
steps: Render timeline.html for any ExtractionResult with messages
Assert page contains a text input for searching
Assert page contains href pointing to index.html (breadcrumb)
